creator: nb_root@videotron.ca
text:
I fixed the issue by using libchk and recompiling everything that was linked 
to the older libssl and libcrypto. After which I recompiled kdenetwork-kopete 
and it connected fine.

Please close the PR, thanks!

Nicolas.

--
